demo.blocked_message: Demo mode is read-only. Training, generation, deletion, and other write actions are disabled.
demo.read_only_note: Read-only screenshot demo database. Training, generation, deletion, and write actions are disabled.
job.next.completed: Next: Evaluate sample images and select the adopted LoRA.
job.next.completed_selected: Next: Export the selected LoRA or create a Validation Run.
job.next.default: Next: Choose the next operation from the Job detail action panel.
job.next.dirty: Next: Settings changed. Prepare files again before running.
job.next.draft: Next: Check the edits and prepare files.
job.next.failed: Next: Check the train.log tail, fix settings, and prepare files again.
job.next.running: Next: Training is running. Check train.log or stop if needed.
job.next.stopped: Next: Review settings if needed, then prepare files and run.

wizard.check.help: ERROR blocks Job creation. WARNING can be accepted after review.
wizard.check.title: Compatibility Check
wizard.dataset.existing_note: When adding to an existing Project, the selected Project settings are used.
wizard.mode.custom_desc: Create from legacy preset and Parameter Editor without a Recipe.
wizard.mode.derived_desc: Pick a parent Job and create a draft while preserving the reason for the diff.
wizard.mode.optimizer_desc: Filter Recipes by AdamW, Prodigy, DAdapt, or another optimizer family.
wizard.mode.purpose_desc: Start from Character Face, Style, or another purpose, then choose a stable Recipe.
wizard.params.derived_hint: Derived mode examples: fine-tune the same Recipe, change only Optimizer, adjust target steps, or go full custom. Differences are kept in the Diff and reason fields below.
wizard.params.help: Usually adjust only Basic fields. Raw Args are advanced because they directly affect sd-scripts.
wizard.params.override_placeholder: Example: adjust repeats to match 5000 steps
wizard.params.raw_warning: Raw Args can bypass Recipe compatibility checks. Use them only after checking sd-scripts behavior.
wizard.params.sample_note: When OFF, sample_prompts are not passed to sd-scripts. When ON, the sample interval is fixed to 1 epoch. Use the post-training Review Pipeline for adoption decisions.
wizard.recipe.direct_help: Recipe cards are the main path. Direct select uses labels that include Model Family.
wizard.recipe.empty: No Recipes match these conditions. Create a Custom Job or add one in Recipe Library.
wizard.recipe.group_hint_purpose: Recipes matching the purpose are grouped by optimizer category.
wizard.recipe.help: Select the Recipe card you will actually use. Creation mode and filters are only helper controls for finding candidates.
wizard.recipe.legacy_help: When Recipe v2 is selected, this preset is kept for compatibility. In Full Custom mode, it becomes the initial value.
wizard.recipe.unselected_hint: Select a Recipe card on the left.
wizard.review.help: Automates Review Plan creation after training completes. Usually use Plan Only.
wizard.review.max_runtime: Maximum estimated runtime for auto start (minutes)
wizard.review.note_plan_only: Plan Only creates only the Review Plan and does not start image generation automatically.
wizard.review.standard_auto: Standard Auto (45 images x candidate epoch)
wizard.summary.help: After creation, Job details show Recipe Snapshot, Resolved Params, and User Overrides Diff.
wizard.summary.title: 6. Pre-creation Summary
wizard.trigger.rescan_hint: Rescan the dataset to calculate trigger consistency.
